title: blumea viscosa var. lyrata
intro: Blumea viscosa var. lyrata, also known as the sticky leaf paperflower, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Blumea viscosa var. lyrata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
